__faion_header__.purpose: Minimum viable risk-matrix artefact for validator smoke-test.

areas.name: billing-subscription-lifecycle
areas.impact_rationale: revenue loss within hours; dispute support cost spikes

areas.name: search-and-filtering
areas.impact_rationale: degraded search slows users but no money loss

areas.name: tenant-isolation
areas.impact_rationale: data residency breach is a regulatory fine

investment_plan.HH: mandatory unit + integration + e2e + monthly exploratory + alerting; owned by Ruslan
investment_plan.HL: mandatory unit + integration + targeted exploratory + alerting; owned by Anna
investment_plan.LL: monitor-only; no test investment until impact or likelihood changes
